headline: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q1 CY2026
summary: Oilfield services company Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, but sales were flat year on year at $5.40 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.55 per share was 10.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Halliburton Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: HOUSTON, April 21, 2026--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) announced today net income of $461 million, or $0.55 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2026. This compares to net income for the first quarter of 2025 of $204 million, or $0.24 per diluted share, and adjusted net income2, excluding impairments and other charges, of $517 million, or $0.60 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2025. Halliburton’s total revenue for the first quarter of 2026 was $5.4 billion, flat when compared

content.summary: HOUSTON, April 21, 2026--Halliburton Company (NYSE: HAL) announced today net income of $461 million, or $0.55 per diluted share, for the first quarter of 2026. This compares to net income for the first quarter of 2025 of $204 million, or $0.24 per diluted share, and adjusted net income2, excluding impairments and other charges, of $517 million, or $0.60 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2025. headline: Fed Chair Hearing, Tesla Earnings: What to Watch This Week
summary: Earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with nearly 20% of the S&P 500 scheduled to report quarterly earnings. Big names reporting include Tesla, Boeing and Intel. Investors will also watch the scheduled testimony Tuesday of Kevin Warsh, President Trump’s nominee for Federal Reserve chair.

headline: Halliburton Beats Q1 2026 Earnings Estimates by 10% — Here’s What It Means for the Stock
summary: Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) delivered a sharper-than-expected Q1 2026 earnings beat on Tuesday morning, posting EPS of $0.55 against a consensus estimate of $0.50, a 10.55% positive surprise. Revenue came in at $5.40 billion versus the $5.30 billion estimate, a 1.80% beat. The magnitude of the EPS outperformance stands out given the volatile oil macro backdrop heading ... Halliburton Beats Q1 2026 Earnings Estimates by 10% — Here’s What It Means for the Stock
